title: UChar-Ungried-Mustard-Pandan-Leaf-Wrap
description: A chewy, adventurous Spanish dish featuring wholegrain mustard and wrapped in lacto-vegetarian-friendly pandan leaves.
instructions: Toast the pandan leaves on a medium-low grill until fragrant, about 5 minutes.
In a bowl, mix mustard, olive oil, salt, and pepper to create a marinade.
Brush the mixed greens with the mustard mixture and let it sit for at least 10 minutes.
Place a pandan leaf on a chopping board. Spoon some of the prepared greens over one-third of the leaf, leaving a small border around the edges.
Fold the sides of the leaf inward to enclose the filling. Seal the opening by pinching gently with your fingers or sealing it with toothpicks if needed.
Cook in a hot (but not smoking) oven at 200°F for about 15-20 minutes until fully cooked and tender, rotating leaves every few minutes.
